subject: fix(config): correct font pairings, invalid overlay type, and outdated counts
body:
Fixes found during 9-point verification of WordPress design token implementation:

1. Typeset (WP 2016): Swapped reversed fonts — Montserrat is for titles,
   Merriweather for body (per WP source material)
2. Flux (WP 2025): Changed body font from Literata to Manrope (WP 2025
   defaults to Manrope for both title and body)
3. Flux (WP 2025): Replaced invalid overlay type 'gradient-diagonal-br'
   with valid 'gradient-br' (5 occurrences)
4. Updated hardcoded counts across 5 files:
   - Themes: 12 → 20 (TutorialModal, README, USER_GUIDE, CLAUDE.md, TESTING_GUIDE)
   - Fonts: 15 → 24 (README, USER_GUIDE, CLAUDE.md)

Verification passed: all Google Fonts available, all overlay types valid,
all theme colors AAA contrast, no ID collisions, 56 tests pass.

Tags: config, docs, fonts, looks, bugfix, verification
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 3
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: wordpress-design-tokens
Semver: patch

title: correct font pairings, invalid overlay type, and outdated counts
